status: AUTHORITATIVE — IL Admin Code Table W (RC-062) class->grade + CMS AFSCME RC-062 rates (eff 2025-07-01)
administering_agency: Illinois Department of Human Services (IDHS), Bureau of Disability Determination Services
salary_schedule_title: Illinois CMS AFSCME Rates of Pay — RC-062 (Regular Formula Rate), effective July 1, 2025
bargaining_status: AFSCME Council 31, bargaining unit RC-062 (Technical); Master Contract 2023-2027 (scheduled raises: 7/1/2023, 1/1/2024, 7/1/2024, 7/1/2025, 7/1/2026). Examiner series and the Specialist are RC-062.
step_basis: monthly (annual = monthly * 12). RC-062 Regular Formula Rate; steps 1b,1a,1,2..8 as of the 7/1/2025 schedule (step 1c was eliminated in the 4% increase).
notes: Class title -> RC-062 pay grade verified from the official Illinois Administrative Code (Title 80, Part 310, Appendix A, Table W — RC-062). Monthly dollar amounts per grade verified from the official IL CMS 'AFSCME Rates of Pay - RC-062' PDF, Regular Formula Rate, EFFECTIVE JULY 1, 2025 page (the current schedule as of 2026-06-02; a future 7/1/2026 page also exists in the same PDF and was NOT used). Dollar figures extracted from the PDF locally with pypdf (the PDF has 5 effective-date pages). Corrections to prior card: the class is 'Disability Claims Adjudicator' (Trainee / I / II), not 'Disability Adjudicator'; the supervisory/lead class is Disability Claims Specialist (grade 19). min = step 1b (lowest step on the 2025 schedule), max = step 8.

Disability Claims Adjudicator Trainee.basis: Authoritative — grade 13 from IL Admin Code Table W; monthly rates from CMS RC-062 Regular Formula Rate eff 2025-07-01. annual = monthly * 12.

Disability Claims Adjudicator I.basis: Authoritative — grade 16 from IL Admin Code Table W; monthly rates from CMS RC-062 Regular Formula Rate eff 2025-07-01.

Disability Claims Adjudicator II.basis: Authoritative — grade 18 from IL Admin Code Table W; monthly rates from CMS RC-062 Regular Formula Rate eff 2025-07-01.

Disability Claims Specialist (lead / fir.basis: Authoritative figures — grade 19 from IL Admin Code Table W; monthly rates from CMS RC-062 Regular Formula Rate eff 2025-07-01. NOTE: this is the senior/lead RC-062 class; true first-line supervision in IDHS may instead be a Public Service Administrator (PSA, merit-comp) title not covered here. Recorded as the highest in-series RC-062 examiner-track class.

data_quality_flags.supervisor_class_identity_note: Specialist (grade 19) used as in-series senior/lead; PSA supervisory title not separately confirmed
